nasb.text: He shall also offer the ram for a sacrifice of peace offerings to the Lord, together with the basket of unleavened cakes; the priest shall likewise offer its grain offering and its drink offering.

esv.text: and he shall offer the ram as a sacrifice of peace offering to the Lord, with the basket of unleavened bread. The priest shall offer also its grain offering and its drink offering.

cnv.text: 他又要把那隻公綿羊和那一籃無酵餅，獻給耶和華作平安祭；祭司也要把同獻的素祭和奠祭獻上。

ccb.text: 然后把公绵羊和无酵饼献给耶和华作平安祭，再献上素祭和奠祭。
